finding_results.notes: Placed Tomas Vale's sister in scene before the ramp intervention, gave her direct donor-recognition beats plus an explicit wage-garnishment risk line before Mira orders the flush, and moved her exit on-page so it happens in immediate response to Yaret's framing and the visible procedure.
finding_results.summary: Vale's sister now witnesses the ramp crisis before the flush, makes the legal and economic cost legible inside Mira's decision, and leaves in real time once Yaret brands the intervention unauthorized.

summary: Revised the chapter-17 climax so the care-versus-case sacrifice is dramatized inside the ramp scene instead of disclosed after the fact.
